description.en: The original Aewol cafe that started the famous cafe street. First opened on Handam Beach, it became a filming location for the K-drama 'Warm and Cozy'. Famous for hallabong ade with ocean views.
description.ko: 애월 카페거리의 시초가 된 오리지널 카페. 한담해변에 처음 문을 열었으며, 드라마 '맨도롱 또똣' 촬영지. 한라봉 에이드가 시그니처.

best_times.en: Weekday mornings 9-11 AM for fewer crowds

tips: Try the hallabong ade — Jeju's signature citrus drink
Sunset views are stunning from the terrace
Connected to a coastal walking trail

description.en: A hidden local restaurant in Andeok-myeon known only to Jeju residents. The modest sign hides incredible dombe meat set meals — moist, tender pork with zero off-flavors. Inside, you'll mostly hear Jeju dialect.
description.ko: 안덕면에 위치한 제주 현지인만 아는 숨은 맛집. 소박한 간판 뒤에 놀라운 돔베고기 정식. 촉촉하고 부드러운 돼지고기가 일품.

tips: Order the Dombe Meat Set Meal
Cash preferred
Mostly Jeju locals speaking in dialect — authentic atmosphere

description.en: A minimalist cafe on Udo Island tucked within a secluded cove with stunning seascapes. Famous for incredibly creamy peanut ice cream and Basque cheesecake, both made with Udo's local peanuts.
description.ko: 우도의 한적한 해안에 자리한 미니멀 카페. 우도 특산 땅콩으로 만든 크리미한 땅콩 아이스크림과 바스크 치즈케이크가 유명.

best_times.en: Midday 11 AM-3 PM, check ferry schedule

tips: Must try the peanut ice cream — Udo's specialty
Check return ferry times before visiting
Best on clear days for ocean views

description.en: A true hidden gem right next to Keuneong Coast in Namwon. Famous for braised cutlassfish and mackerel made with fresh Jeju fish cooked daily. Zero fishy taste — the mark of truly fresh seafood.
description.ko: 남원읍 큰넝 해안 바로 옆의 숨은 맛집. 매일 잡은 신선한 제주 생선으로 만든 갈치조림과 고등어조림이 유명. 비린내가 전혀 없는 것이 특징.

tips: Try the braised cutlassfish (갈치조림)
Right on the coast — stunning views
Popular with local fishermen

description.en: Jeju's oldest and largest traditional market, established in 1945. A bustling indoor market renowned for the freshest seafood, where you can sample raw fish, omegi tteok (Jeju rice cakes), and gogi guksu (pork noodle soup).
description.ko: 1945년 설립된 제주 최대 전통시장. 신선한 회, 오메기떡, 고기국수 등 제주 대표 먹거리가 가득한 실내 시장.

tips: Try omegi tteok (Jeju rice cakes) and gogi guksu
Morning is best for fresh catches
Abebe Bakery is right next to Gate 12

description.en: A glass-walled cafe on Aewol's northern coast with spectacular 360-degree panoramic ocean views from its rooftop terrace. Famous for fresh-baked bread using only organically fermented ingredients.
description.ko: 애월 북쪽 해안의 유리벽 카페. 루프탑에서 360도 파노라마 오션뷰 감상 가능. 유기농 발효 재료로 매일 굽는 빵이 유명.

tips: Head straight to the rooftop for 360-degree views
Their daily-baked bread sells out fast
Black basalt coastline views are uniquely Jeju

description.en: A charming Hallim cafe with wide glass windows overlooking the west coast and Biyangdo island. Interior features large plants, vintage furniture, exposed brick, and a glass roof that lets golden sunlight pour in.
description.ko: 한림읍의 감성 카페. 넓은 유리창으로 서쪽 해안과 비양도를 조망. 대형 식물, 빈티지 가구, 노출 벽돌, 채광 좋은 유리 지붕이 특징.

best_times.en: Afternoon 2-5 PM when sunlight fills the space

tips: Window seats facing Biyangdo are the best
Great for rainy days with the glass roof
Try their signature coffee with west coast views

description.en: Legendary Jeju seafood restaurant known for grilled hairtail fish marinated in soy sauce until crispy and tender. The set menu includes braised mackerel, savory pancakes, and sea urchin seaweed soup.
description.ko: 간장양념 갈치구이가 바삭하고 부드러운 전설의 제주 해산물 맛집. 세트 메뉴에 고등어조림, 전, 성게미역국 포함.

best_times.en: Lunch or early dinner, 11 AM-6 PM

tips: Order the grilled hairtail fish set
Sea urchin seaweed soup is a must-try side
Portions are generous — share if dining as a couple

description.en: A beloved meat noodle restaurant near Jeju Airport, recognized by Jeju locals for its chewy noodles in rich pork bone broth. Opens early morning — perfect for catching early flights or arriving hungry.
description.ko: 제주공항 근처 현지인 인정 고기국수 맛집. 쫄깃한 면에 진한 돼지뼈 육수. 이른 아침부터 영업해 비행기 전후로 방문하기 좋음.

tips: Perfect for a meal before early flights
Chewy handmade noodles are the star
Simple menu — just order gogi guksu

description.en: A local favorite bakery next to Dongmun Market Gate 12. Beloved by Jeju residents for its creative reinterpretation of Jeju local ingredients into artisan baked goods.
description.ko: 동문시장 12번 게이트 옆 제주 로컬 베이커리. 제주 로컬 식재료를 재해석한 수제 빵으로 도민들에게 사랑받는 곳.

address.en: Near Dongmun Market Gate 12, Jeju-si, Jeju-do

best_times.en: Morning 9-11 AM when bread is freshest

tips: Try their Jeju-ingredient breads
Can combine with Dongmun Market visit
Sells out quickly on weekends

description.en: Dedicated museum exploring the culture of Jeju's legendary haenyeo — female free-divers who harvest seafood without oxygen tanks. Learn about this UNESCO-recognized cultural heritage through artifacts, photos, and multimedia exhibits.
description.ko: 제주 해녀 문화를 깊이 있게 탐구하는 전용 박물관. 산소탱크 없이 잠수하는 해녀들의 유네스코 무형문화유산을 유물과 멀티미디어로 소개.

tips: Watch the haenyeo diving demonstration if available
Free admission
Combine with east coast drive

description.en: A Seogwipo cafe converted from a 40-year-old tangerine storage shed by the owner's granddaughter. Signature floor-to-ceiling windows overlook tangerine orchards. Everything on the menu features Jeju citrus.
description.ko: 40년 된 귤 창고를 손녀가 카페로 개조. 시그니처 통창으로 귤밭 조망. 메뉴 전체가 제주 감귤을 활용.

tips: The tangerine orchard view through floor-to-ceiling windows is iconic
Try the hallabong cake
Beautiful in tangerine season (Nov-Feb)

description.en: Udo Island's most famous beach with blinding white coral sand and turquoise waters. The 'sand' is actually rhodolith coral fragments — a rare natural treasure classified as a Korean national monument.
description.ko: 우도에서 가장 유명한 해변. 눈부신 하얀 산호모래와 청록색 바다. '모래'는 실제로 홍조류 알갱이로, 대한민국 천연기념물로 지정.

best_times.en: Summer months, early morning to avoid crowds

tips: The coral sand is protected — do not take any home
Check ferry schedule from Seongsan Port (15 min ride)
Bring water shoes for comfort

description.en: A dramatic oceanfront cafe near Jungmun where volcanic basalt meets the sea. Sit just meters from crashing waves against black rocks. One of the most atmospheric cafes on the south coast.
description.ko: 중문 근처 현무암 해안 절벽 위의 카페. 검은 바위에 부딪히는 파도를 바로 앞에서 감상. 남쪽 해안에서 가장 분위기 있는 카페.

best_times.en: Any time, especially dramatic during storms

tips: Window seats facing the basalt coast are best
Great even on rainy or stormy days
Near Jungmun Beach and Jusangjeolli Cliff

description.en: A 1950s warehouse converted into a cafe that blends Jeju heritage with modern aesthetics. Famous for barley-based drinks and desserts that celebrate Jeju's agricultural traditions.
description.ko: 1950년대 창고를 개조한 카페. 제주의 전통과 현대적 감각이 조화. 보리 음료와 디저트로 제주의 농업 전통을 재해석.

tips: Try the barley latte — unique to this cafe
The 1950s warehouse architecture is worth exploring
Less crowded than Aewol cafe street

description.en: A dramatic coastal formation near Sanbangsan Mountain with a 700m walking path along volcanic cliffs. Features a WWII-era cave trench dug by the Japanese military, and haenyeo sell fresh-caught seafood at the entrance.
description.ko: 산방산 근처의 드라마틱한 해안 절경. 700m 해안 산책로. 일제강점기 동굴참호와 입구에서 해녀가 파는 신선한 해산물이 특징.

best_times.en: Low tide, check tidal conditions before visiting
best_times.ko: 썰물 시, 방문 전 조수 상태 확인

tips: Closed during high tide or rough seas — check before going
Buy fresh seafood from haenyeo at the entrance
Wear sturdy shoes for the rocky path

description.en: A no-frills local restaurant near Jeju Airport that serves 500g of pork ribs for just 23,000 won. Perfect for a hearty meal right after landing or before departure.
description.ko: 제주공항 근처의 소박한 로컬 맛집. 돼지갈비 500g을 23,000원에 제공. 도착 직후나 출발 전 든든한 식사로 완벽.

tips: Amazing value — 500g pork ribs for 23,000 won
Perfect first or last meal on Jeju
Cash preferred

description.en: A hidden beach on Udo Island accessible only on foot — no cars allowed. Named after its manger-shaped concave coastline. At low tide, a rock shaped like the Korean Peninsula (Hanbandoyeo) is fully exposed.
description.ko: 우도에서 도보로만 접근 가능한 숨겨진 해변. 구유 모양의 오목한 해안선에서 이름 유래. 썰물 때 한반도 모양의 한반도여 바위가 드러남.

best_times.en: Low tide to see the Korean Peninsula rock

tips: Only accessible on foot — truly hidden
Visit at low tide for the famous rock formation
Bring your own water and snacks
